message: Generate clean checksums in dist workflow (relative filenames only)

files.patch:
@@ -43,8 +43,11 @@ jobs:
           ~/.cargo/bin/dist build --installer shell --installer powershell
       - name: Checksums
         run: |
-          find target/dist -type f ! -name "*.sha256" -print0 | while IFS= read -r -d '' f; do
-            sha256sum "$f" > "$f.sha256";
+          cd target/dist
+          find . -maxdepth 1 -type f ! -name "*.sha256" -print0 | while IFS= read -r -d '' f; do
+            # Strip leading ./ from find output
+            filename="${f#./}"
+            sha256sum "$filename" > "$filename.sha256";
           done
       - name: Upload artifacts (workflow)
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
